project.name: AgentHACD
project.description: PoW-anchored AI agent identity — a HACD Stack Asset that gives each AI agent a credible, sybil-resistant on-chain identity formed through real Proof-of-Work cost, with durable formation history and on-chain attestation credits.

asset.utility_summary: Each HACD lot mints 1 non-fungible agent identity (the agent's PoW-anchored on-chain identity) plus 65,536 fungible attestation credits used to score and attest to agent behavior. Identities are formed through PoW + HAC stack cost, making agent registration economically non-trivial and sybil-resistant.

launch.target_date_utc: Needs issuer confirmation — intended Launchpad date on/after 2026-07-01

copy.headline: AgentHACD — Proof-of-Work identity for AI agents
copy.subheadline: Each agent identity is formed through real PoW cost, not printed from nothing. Sybil-resistant agent identity on HACD.
copy.short_description: AgentHACD gives AI agents credible on-chain identity by forming it on HACD's PoW container. One HACD lot = one agent identity NFT + attestation credits. Formation costs real HAC, so creating fake agents is economically non-trivial.
copy.risk_disclosure: AgentHACD is a HACD Stack Asset, not an investment product. No return, price floor, or liquidity is guaranteed. Stack cost is a formation cost reference, not a price guarantee. Agent identity does not guarantee agent quality or correctness — it attests to formation provenance and sybil-resistance only. Not financial advice. Final Launchpad parameters must be verified by HACD Labs before going live.

notes: Draft package generated via HACD Incubator AI Issuance Skill.
Founder/contact and exact target launch date need issuer confirmation.
Supply math: 256 lots x 65,536 units = 16,777,216 total attestation credits; 64 first-phase + 192 public-phase = 256 lots; formation cost = 256 x 50 HAC = 12,800 HAC.
Roadmap items (GrowStreams streaming integration, NANDA interop) are planned, not launch utility.
